---
title: "ED Fig 11d-f - EB3 length under CK-666 (DIV-2, deconvolved cropped)"
author: "Lin et al., Nature 2026 (Bradke lab, DZNE)"
output: html_notebook
params:
  div: 2
  image_pipeline: "cropped"
  summary_variable: "growth_lifetime_mean"
  pdf_name: "EB3_length.eps"
  d_drive_source: "D:\\DVElite\\CK666_LA_EB3\\240225_DIV2_EB3\\decon\\cropped\\read_stat.Rmd"
---

<!--
================================================================================
  Wrapper for ED Fig 11d-f, batch: DIV-2 + deconvolved + cropped ROI.
================================================================================
  Includes canonical template at:
      ../../templates/edfig11df_eb3_length_under_ck666.Rmd

  Parameters supplied above:
    - div = 2                                   -> DIV-2 stage
    - image_pipeline = "cropped"                -> str_extract uses
                                                   "(?<=cropped/)..."
    - summary_variable = "growth_lifetime_mean" -> per-cell EB3 metric.
                                                   This is the ONLY wrapper
                                                   using "lifetime_mean" instead
                                                   of "speed_median" (legacy
                                                   choice preserved verbatim).
    - pdf_name = "EB3_length.eps"               -> ggsave filename
    - d_drive_source                            -> D:\ provenance

  Original 255-line monolithic wrapper extracted into a canonical template
  on 2026-05-12. See ``templates/edfig11df_eb3_length_under_ck666.Rmd``.

  Essentiality: Replicate-QC. Canonical:
                edfig11f_eb3_tip_integrated_intensity.Rmd.
-->

```{r child = "../../templates/edfig11df_eb3_length_under_ck666.Rmd"}
```
